description_long: This is a modern event stage structure with a prominent pentagonal archway framing the front, featuring the 'Kronenbourg' branding at the top. The stage area is elevated and flanked by two sets of white, block-like seating or display units on either side. The backdrop displays a dramatic graphic of a crowd and a central figure, set against a red and black color scheme. The floor is a large, dark hexagonal platform with a red emblem in the center, providing ample space for performers or speakers. The materials appear to be primarily painted wood or composite panels, with possible metal supports and printed fabric or vinyl for the graphics. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban promotional events or public gatherings.
description: A modern, pentagonal-arched event stage with bold branding, flanked by white seating blocks and a dramatic graphic backdrop on a dark hexagonal platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pentagonal arch, 'Kronenbourg' branding, central stage area, and dramatic graphic backdrop.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the arrangement of white seating blocks and the open structure of the stage area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the full graphic backdrop and the symmetrical placement of the white seating blocks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open stage area, seating arrangement, and the depth of the arch structure.
